query:
SELECT mvj.id as jobId, mvj.status, mvj.title,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM musicVideoScenes WHERE jobId = mvj.id AND status = 'failed') as failedScenes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM musicVideoScenes WHERE jobId = mvj.id) as totalScenes
FROM musicVideoJobs mvj
ORDER BY mvj.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
